---
title: "Variety Trial Analysis Report"
author: "AJ Brown"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
params:
  in_csv:
    label: "Input trial CSV"
    value: "../real_data/MilletVT2025.csv" # "../real_data/trial_real.csv" or "../sim_data/trial_sim.csv"
  out_dir:
    label: "Output directory"
    value: "../real_output"             # "../real_output" or "../sim_output"
  alpha:
    label: "Significance level (alpha)"
    value: 0.05
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  message = TRUE,
  warning = TRUE
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# Optional: force project root as knit root if you prefer
# knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
```

## 1. Overview

This report runs the backend variety-trial analysis, summarizes the data structure, and displays key outputs.

```{r params-print}
params
```

## 2. Source backend and run analysis

```{r run-analysis}
# This Rmd lives in ./code
# Backend script is also in ./code
backend_script <- "r_equivalent.R"

if (!file.exists(backend_script)) {
  stop("Backend script not found: ", backend_script)
}

source(backend_script)

# Run analysis using parameters
res <- analyze_trial(
  in_csv  = params$in_csv,
  out_dir = params$out_dir,
  alpha   = params$alpha
)

# Read trial and run_report using paths relative to this Rmd (./code)
trial       <- read.csv(params$in_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
report_path <- file.path(params$out_dir, "run_report.txt")
run_report  <- if (file.exists(report_path)) readLines(report_path) else character(0)
```

## 3. Data characteristics

### Structure

```{r}
str(trial)
```

### Environment summary

```{r}
env_summary <- trial %>%
  dplyr::group_by(env) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_plots   = dplyr::n(),
    n_missing = sum(is.na(yield)),
    n_used    = n_plots - n_missing,
    n_rep     = dplyr::n_distinct(rep),
    n_entry   = dplyr::n_distinct(entry),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

kable(env_summary, caption = "Environment summary") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## 4. Stage 1 results

```{r}
kable(res$best_cov, caption = "Stage 1 best covariance models") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

```{r}
res$best_cov %>%
  dplyr::count(best_cov) %>%
  ggplot(aes(best_cov, n)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Stage 1 covariance model frequency",
       x = "Covariance model",
       y = "Number of environments")
```

## 5. Stage 2 LS-means and CLD

```{r}
lsm <- res$lsm_across
cld <- res$cld
out <- dplyr::left_join(lsm, cld, by = "entry")

kable(out, caption = "Across-environment LS-means with CLD") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## 6. BLUPs

```{r}
kable(head(res$blups, 10), caption = "Entry BLUPs (first 10)") %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## 7. Field heatmap and Tukey plot

```{r}
# Decide label based on path
mode_label <- if (grepl("sim_data", params$in_csv)) "sim" else "real"

plots <- make_summary_plots(
  in_csv     = params$in_csv,
  out_dir    = params$out_dir,
  mode_label = mode_label
)

#plots
```

## 8. Run report

```{r}
if (length(run_report)) {
  cat("```text\n")
  cat(paste(run_report, collapse = "\n"))
  cat("\n```\n")
} else {
  cat("No run report found in ", report_path)
}
```
